maps.title: MAP: Endeavour latest security standards
maps.objective: To ensure endeavour to migrate to latest security standards

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Endeavour latest security standards
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Endeavour latest security standards'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes: Review control description: However, they shall endeavour to migrate to latest security standards.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Endeavour latest security standards
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to endeavour to migrate to latest security standards. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Endeavour latest security standards
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Endeavour latest security standards'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Endeavour latest security standards
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Endeavour latest security standards' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Endeavour latest security stan
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Endeavour latest security standards'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Ensure / awareness programs on

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Ensure / awareness programs on
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Ensure / awareness programs on'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Obtain Board/Management approval for policy: Ensure / awareness programs on
tasks.description: Present the drafted policy for 'Ensure / awareness programs on' to the Board or Senior Management for formal ratification. Record approval in the Board/Committee meeting minutes. Ensure the approved policy is version-controlled and stored in the policy repository.
tasks.expected_evidence: Board resolution or Committee minutes referencing policy approval
tasks.implementation_notes: Approval must be captured in formal minutes, not email.

tasks.title: Conduct staff training on: Ensure / awareness programs on
tasks.description: Design and deliver a mandatory training programme on 'Ensure / awareness programs on' for all relevant staff in: IT, Risk, HR, Operations. Training content must cover the regulatory background, internal policy, responsibilities, and reporting obligations. Capture attendance records. Administer a post-training assessment. Retain training records for a minimum of 3 years.
tasks.deliverable: Training Completion Records and Assessment Results
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed attendance register and post-training assessment scores

tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Comply security practices and risk'.
